metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The old dog woke up from a deep sleep. The old dog walked to the kitchen slowly. The old dog ate a large bowl of food. The old dog went back to sleep on the rug.
The small bird found a long brown worm. The small bird flew to a high tree branch. The small bird dropped the worm by mistake. The small bird watched the worm fall to the ground.
The hungry bear wandered into the busy campsite. The hungry bear found a cooler full of food. The hungry bear opened the cooler with sharp claws. The hungry bear consumed all the hot dogs inside.

The large lion rested under a shady acacia tree. The large lion saw a herd of zebras approaching. The large lion stood up from the comfortable spot. The large lion stalked the herd through the tall grass.

The young tiger crept through the thick jungle undergrowth. The young tiger leaped over a fallen wooden log. The young tiger landed awkwardly on a sharp rock. The young tiger limped away with a sore paw.

The grey elephant sucked water into a long trunk. The grey elephant sprayed the cold water over a dusty back. The grey elephant felt much cooler in the hot sun. The grey elephant continued walking across the vast savanna.
The wild monkey climbed the tall fruit tree. The wild monkey picked a ripe yellow banana. The wild monkey peeled the banana with quick hands. The wild monkey ate the sweet fruit very quickly.

The green snake slithered out from under a rock. The green snake bit a small brown mouse quickly. The green snake swallowed the small brown mouse whole. The green snake rested in the warm sun for hours.
The tiny frog sat on a large green lily pad. The tiny frog saw a fly buzzing nearby. The tiny frog shot out a long sticky tongue. The tiny frog caught the fly in mid air.
The orange fish swam away from the coral reef. The orange fish entered a dark underwater cave. The orange fish got stuck between two heavy rocks. The orange fish wiggled free after a long struggle.

The great shark smelled blood in the salty water. The great shark swam toward the source of the scent. The great shark attacked the injured seal with sharp teeth. The great shark consumed the meal in a few bites.

The blue whale dove deep into the cold ocean. The blue whale opened a massive mouth very wide. The blue whale swallowed thousands of tiny krill at once. The blue whale surfaced to breathe air through a blowhole.
The grey dolphin leaped high out of the water. The grey dolphin spun twice in the warm air. The grey dolphin splashed back into the ocean waves. The grey dolphin swam back to the pod quickly.

The small penguin stood on the cold ice floe. The small penguin dove into the freezing ocean water. The small penguin caught a silver fish in a sharp beak. The small penguin brought the fish back to a hungry chick.
The brown seal basked on the rocky ocean shore. The brown seal heard a loud noise from a boat. The brown seal slid off the rocks into the water. The brown seal swam away from the noisy boat.
The red crab walked sideways across the sandy beach. The red crab found a small empty seashell. The red crab squeezed into the new empty seashell. The red crab hid inside the shell from a seagull.

The large lobster crawled along the dark ocean floor. The large lobster caught a small fish in a claw. The large lobster crushed the small fish with immense force. The large lobster ate the fish in the dark water.

The slow snail crawled across the wet concrete sidewalk. The slow snail reached the edge of a green lawn. The slow snail climbed up a blade of green grass. The slow snail rested at the top of the grass.
The earth worm wriggled out of the wet soil. The earth worm moved across the wet paved driveway. The earth worm dried out in the hot morning sun. The earth worm died on the hot paved driveway.
The red car sped down the empty highway. The red car hit a deep pothole in the road. The red car blew a tire with a loud bang. The red car skidded to a halt on the shoulder.

The delivery truck arrived at the busy warehouse loading dock. The delivery truck backed up to the large open doors. The delivery truck unloaded several large wooden pallets. The delivery truck drove away empty from the busy warehouse.

The school bus stopped at the busy street corner. The school bus opened the doors for the waiting children. The school bus filled up with many noisy students. The school bus drove toward the local elementary school.

The freight train carried coal across the long bridge. The freight train derailed near the small quiet town. The freight train spilled coal all over the green fields. The freight train blocked the tracks for three whole days.

The passenger plane took off from the long runway. The passenger plane hit a flock of birds in the air. The passenger plane lost power in the left engine. The passenger plane returned to the airport for an emergency landing.
The small boat sailed out into the deep bay. The small boat encountered a sudden violent storm. The small boat flipped over in the rough ocean waves. The small boat sank to the bottom of the bay.

The cruise ship left the port with many passengers. The cruise ship hit a hidden reef in the ocean. The cruise ship took on water through a large hole. The cruise ship evacuated all passengers into small lifeboats.

The blue bicycle hit a sharp rock on the trail. The blue bicycle flipped over the handle bars suddenly. The blue bicycle crashed into a large wooden fence. The blue bicycle suffered a bent front wheel in the crash.

The fast motorcycle raced down the narrow country road. The fast motorcycle slid on a patch of wet leaves. The fast motorcycle crashed into a deep muddy ditch. The fast motorcycle sustained heavy damage to the front forks.

The motor scooter sputtered loudly in the city traffic. The motor scooter ran completely out of gas. The motor scooter stopped rolling near a busy intersection. The motor scooter required a push to the gas station.

The news helicopter hovered over the burning building. The news helicopter filmed the large flames from above. The news helicopter transmitted the video to the television station. The news helicopter flew back to the airport for fuel.

The nuclear submarine dove below the thick arctic ice. The nuclear submarine navigated through the dark freezing water. The nuclear submarine launched a scientific probe into the ocean. The nuclear submarine returned to the home port after months.

The space rocket ignited engines on the launch pad. The space rocket lifted off the ground with immense force. The space rocket broke through the Earth's atmosphere. The space rocket deployed a satellite into low orbit.

The green tractor pulled a plow through the field. The green tractor broke a metal pin in the hitch. The green tractor stopped moving in the middle of the field. The green tractor required repairs before finishing the plowing.
The white van parked outside the large bank. The white van unloaded three men in dark masks. The white van waited outside with the engine running. The white van sped away leaving no trace behind.

The fast ambulance turned on loud sirens. The fast ambulance rushed through the crowded city streets. The fast ambulance picked up an injured man from a crash. The fast ambulance transported the man to the nearest hospital.

The fire engine rushed out of the fire station. The fire engine arrived at the burning house quickly. The fire engine sprayed water on the massive hot flames. The fire engine extinguished the dangerous fire in one hour.

The yellow taxi picked up a passenger at the airport. The yellow taxi drove to a hotel in the city. The yellow taxi dropped the passenger off at the entrance. The yellow taxi drove away to find another fare.

The horse carriage hit a large bump in the road. The horse carriage lost a wooden wheel immediately. The horse carriage tilted to one side sharply. The horse carriage spilled passengers onto the dirt road.
The wooden sled slid down the snowy hill quickly. The wooden sled hit a hidden rock under the snow. The wooden sled broke apart into several pieces. The wooden sled left the riders in the cold snow.

The math teacher wrote a difficult equation on the board. The math teacher asked the students to solve the problem. The math teacher waited for a student to raise a hand. The math teacher explained the correct answer to the class.

The busy doctor examined the patient in the clinic. The busy doctor diagnosed a severe case of the flu. The busy doctor prescribed medication for the sick patient. The busy doctor sent the patient home to rest.

The night nurse checked the monitors in the hospital room. The night nurse noticed a sudden drop in blood pressure. The night nurse called the doctor immediately for help. The night nurse administered emergency medication to the patient.

The police officer saw a car run a red light. The police officer turned on the patrol car sirens. The police officer pulled the speeding car over. The police officer wrote a ticket for the angry driver.

The brave firefighter entered the smoke filled house. The brave firefighter found a trapped dog in the kitchen. The brave firefighter carried the dog outside to safety. The brave firefighter gave the dog oxygen from a mask.

The head chef chopped vegetables on a wooden board. The head chef threw the vegetables into a hot pan. The head chef sautéed the vegetables with butter and garlic. The head chef served the dish to a waiting customer.
The local baker mixed yeast into warm water. The local baker added flour to create a soft dough. The local baker baked the dough in a hot oven. The local baker sold the fresh bread to a customer.

The old farmer planted corn seeds in the spring. The old farmer watered the fields throughout the hot summer. The old farmer harvested the corn in the cool autumn. The old farmer sold the corn at the local market.

The talented artist sketched a portrait with a pencil. The talented artist added bright colors with oil paints. The talented artist framed the finished painting in wood. The talented artist hung the painting in a local gallery.

The classical musician tuned a wooden violin carefully. The classical musician walked onto the brightly lit stage. The classical musician played a beautiful concerto for the audience. The classical musician bowed deeply after the final note.

The famous singer stepped up to the microphone. The famous singer sang a popular song loudly. The famous singer forgot the lyrics in the middle. The famous singer ran off the stage in immense embarrassment.

The young actor forgot a line during the play. The young actor paused awkwardly on the stage. The young actor improvised a new line quickly. The young actor received applause from the forgiving audience.

The tired writer typed a final sentence on the computer. The tired writer saved the document to a hard drive. The tired writer sent the manuscript to a publisher. The tired writer drank a large glass of wine.

The skilled plumber inspected the leaking pipe in the basement. The skilled plumber cut out the damaged section of pipe. The skilled plumber soldered a new copper pipe into place. The skilled plumber restored the water pressure to the house.

The busy electrician turned off the main power breaker. The busy electrician replaced the faulty wires in the wall. The busy electrician installed a new light fixture in the ceiling. The busy electrician turned the power back on safely.

The master carpenter selected a fine piece of oak wood. The master carpenter cut the wood with a sharp saw. The master carpenter sanded the edges until very smooth. The master carpenter built a beautiful wooden dining table.

The auto mechanic lifted the car on a hydraulic hoist. The auto mechanic drained the old oil from the engine. The auto mechanic filled the engine with fresh synthetic oil. The auto mechanic lowered the car back to the ground.

The airline pilot started the jet engines on the runway. The airline pilot flew the plane through a bad storm. The airline pilot landed the plane safely in heavy rain. The airline pilot thanked the passengers for flying the airline.

The old sailor raised the sails on the wooden boat. The old sailor navigated the boat out of the harbor. The old sailor caught a large fish in the deep ocean. The old sailor returned to port before sunset.

The brave soldier marched across the hot desert sand. The brave soldier spotted an enemy camp in the distance. The brave soldier radioed the coordinates to the command center. The brave soldier waited for further orders in silence.

The old oak tree lost many leaves in the autumn. The old oak tree stood bare throughout the cold winter. The old oak tree grew new green buds in the spring. The old oak tree provided thick shade in the summer.

The red rose bush produced many tight green buds. The red rose bush bloomed with beautiful flowers in June. The red rose bush attracted many bees during the summer. The red rose bush lost all petals in the autumn wind.

The small berry bush grew wild in the dense forest. The small berry bush produced sweet fruit in the summer. The small berry bush fed many hungry birds. The small berry bush withered in the cold winter snow.

The green grass grew very tall after the spring rain. The green grass turned brown during the summer drought. The green grass caught fire from a careless cigarette. The green grass burned completely to the bare dirt.

The mountain river flowed quickly over smooth gray rocks. The mountain river flooded the banks during a heavy rainstorm. The mountain river washed away a small wooden bridge. The mountain river returned to normal levels after three days.

The calm lake froze solid during the severe cold snap. The calm lake supported ice skaters for two long months. The calm lake melted rapidly in the warm spring sun. The calm lake warmed enough for swimming by late June.

The vast ocean crashed violently against the rocky cliffs. The vast ocean eroded the soft stone over many years. The vast ocean created a deep cave in the cliff face. The vast ocean filled the cave during high tide.

The tall mountain collected heavy snow during the winter. The tall mountain experienced a massive avalanche in the spring. The tall mountain lost tons of snow into the valley. The tall mountain blocked the road with debris.

The grassy hill turned green after the heavy rain. The grassy hill provided food for a flock of sheep. The grassy hill dried out in the hot summer sun. The grassy hill turned a golden brown color by August.

The heavy rock balanced precariously on the cliff edge. The heavy rock fell from the cliff during a minor earthquake. The heavy rock rolled down the steep mountain side. The heavy rock smashed into a large pine tree.

The smooth stone skipped three times across the pond water. The smooth stone lost momentum near the middle. The smooth stone sank to the muddy bottom quickly. The smooth stone rested undisturbed for many years.

The dark storm cloud gathered over the small quiet town. The dark storm cloud released a heavy downpour of rain. The dark storm cloud produced bright flashes of dangerous lightning. The dark storm cloud moved away toward the eastern mountains.

The strong wind blew through the narrow city streets. The strong wind knocked over several plastic garbage cans. The strong wind scattered trash all over the pavement. The strong wind died down completely by the late evening.

The heavy rain washed the dirt off the parked cars. The heavy rain filled the gutters with fast flowing water. The heavy rain overflowed onto the busy city sidewalks. The heavy rain stopped suddenly after one hour.

The soft snow fell gently on the quiet neighborhood. The soft snow covered the streets in a white blanket. The soft snow froze into solid ice overnight. The soft snow caused many car accidents the next morning.

The severe storm destroyed many homes in the coastal town. The severe storm flooded the streets with dark ocean water. The severe storm knocked out the power for three days. The severe storm caused millions of dollars in total damage.
The hot sun baked the dry earth in the desert. The hot sun caused cracks to form in the dirt. The hot sun blinded a lost hiker in the dunes. The hot sun finally set behind the distant mountains.

The full moon rose over the dark silent forest. The full moon illuminated the path for a nocturnal predator. The full moon hid behind a thick patch of clouds. The full moon disappeared below the horizon at dawn.

The bright star burned hot in the vast dark galaxy. The bright star exhausted all nuclear fuel over billions of years. The bright star exploded in a massive brilliant supernova. The bright star collapsed into a dense black hole.

The rocky planet orbited a distant foreign star. The rocky planet sustained a massive asteroid impact. The rocky planet lost the entire atmosphere into space. The rocky planet became a barren dead world.

The wooden chair broke under the weight of a large man. The wooden chair collapsed into splinters on the floor. The wooden chair went into the fireplace for kindling. The wooden chair burned to ashes during the cold night.

The glass table shattered from a falling heavy book. The glass table scattered sharp fragments across the rug. The glass table required careful cleaning with a vacuum. The glass table ended up in the garbage bin.

The comfortable bed provided a good night of sleep. The comfortable bed developed a broken spring in the middle. The comfortable bed caused severe back pain the next morning. The comfortable bed went to the dump soon after.

The old sofa absorbed a large spilled cup of coffee. The old sofa developed a terrible dark brown stain. The old sofa smelled like sour milk for weeks. The old sofa ended up on the front porch permanently.
The desk lamp fell off the edge of the desk. The desk lamp hit the hard floor with a crash. The desk lamp shattered the glass bulb into pieces. The desk lamp stopped working entirely after the fall.

The expensive rug collected dirt from muddy boots. The expensive rug went to a professional cleaner in town. The expensive rug shrank during the harsh chemical washing process. The expensive rug no longer fit in the living room.

The wall clock fell off the nail in the wall. The wall clock smashed the glass face on the floor. The wall clock stopped ticking completely upon impact. The wall clock ended up in a large cardboard box.

The bathroom mirror fogged up during a hot shower. The bathroom mirror reflected a blurry face in the mist. The bathroom mirror cracked from a sudden temperature change. The bathroom mirror fell into the sink in pieces.

The glass window broke from a thrown baseball. The glass window let cold air into the living room. The glass window required a costly repair from a glazier. The glass window looked brand new after the fix.

The heavy door slammed shut in the strong wind. The heavy door broke the wooden frame near the hinges. The heavy door jammed tightly in the ruined frame. The heavy door required a crowbar to open again.

The old television displayed a fuzzy black and white picture. The old television lost the audio signal completely. The old television sparked brightly from the back panel. The old television died with a loud popping noise.

The small radio picked up a faint signal from far away. The small radio played a classic rock song loudly. The small radio lost power due to dead batteries. The small radio sat silently on the wooden shelf.

The laptop computer crashed during an important software update. The laptop computer displayed a bright blue screen of death. The laptop computer lost all saved files on the hard drive. The laptop computer required a complete system wipe to fix.
The smart phone fell out of a coat pocket. The smart phone landed in a deep puddle of water. The smart phone shorted out internal circuits instantly. The smart phone refused to turn on ever again.

The heavy book fell from the high wooden shelf. The heavy book hit a student on the head hard. The heavy book caused a mild concussion for the student. The heavy book sat abandoned on the library floor.
The blue pen leaked ink into a shirt pocket. The blue pen ruined an expensive white dress shirt. The blue pen ended up in the trash can immediately. The blue pen left a permanent stain on the fabric.

The yellow pencil broke the graphite tip on the paper. The yellow pencil went into the loud electric sharpener. The yellow pencil came out with a sharp new point. The yellow pencil wrote a beautiful poem on the page.

The coffee cup slipped from a sleepy hand. The coffee cup shattered on the hard kitchen tiles. The coffee cup spilled hot coffee all over the floor. The coffee cup required ten paper towels to clean up.

The ceramic plate dropped onto the hard dining floor. The ceramic plate broke cleanly into exactly two pieces. The ceramic plate went back together with strong glue. The ceramic plate held food safely again after drying.

The soup bowl cracked in the hot microwave oven. The soup bowl leaked hot chicken broth onto the glass plate. The soup bowl burned a hand during removal. The soup bowl went straight into the kitchen trash.

The local museum purchased a rare painting from a private collector. The local museum hired three new security guards for the night shift. The local museum repaired the leaking roof above the Egyptian exhibit. The local museum printed new glossy brochures for international tourists.

The city park lost a large tree during a heavy storm. The city park received a new coat of green paint on benches. The city park hosted a small music festival for local children. The city park served as a meeting place for amateur painters.

The large zoo acquired a young giraffe from another country. The large zoo built a new enclosure for the polar bears. The large zoo sold out of tickets during a holiday weekend. The large zoo hired a renowned veterinarian for the reptile house.

The general hospital installed a new magnetic resonance imaging machine. The general hospital organized a blood drive in the main lobby. The general hospital repainted the pediatric ward with bright cheerful colors. The general hospital awarded a medal to a retiring chief surgeon.

The state university published a groundbreaking study on climate change. The state university hosted a debate between two prominent political candidates. The state university constructed a new dormitory for freshman students. The state university won a national championship in track and field.

The downtown bank opened a new branch in the suburbs. The downtown bank upgraded the security software on all automated tellers. The downtown bank sponsored a local marathon for charity. The downtown bank hired twenty new analysts for the investment division.

The Italian restaurant updated the wine list with imported vintages. The Italian restaurant hosted a private wedding reception on the patio. The Italian restaurant fired a sous chef for terrible kitchen hygiene. The Italian restaurant won a local award for best pasta dish.

The busy cafe introduced a new blend of dark roast coffee. The busy cafe hung abstract art by a local college student. The busy cafe replaced the uncomfortable wooden chairs with soft armchairs. The busy cafe fixed the leaking espresso machine in the kitchen.

The grand hotel hosted a convention for antique coin collectors. The grand hotel renovated the penthouse suite with expensive marble floors. The grand hotel hired a famous chef for the main dining room. The grand hotel replaced the carpets in all the guest hallways.

The old cinema screened a classic black and white film. The old cinema installed new digital projectors in every single theater. The old cinema sold out of popcorn during a busy weekend. The old cinema replaced the torn velvet curtains in the lobby.

The local theater staged a production of a famous Shakespeare play. The local theater received a massive grant from the city council. The local theater repaired the broken stage lights before the premiere. The local theater held auditions for an upcoming musical comedy.

The sports stadium hosted a massive outdoor rock music concert. The sports stadium upgraded the giant video screen in the endzone. The sports stadium replaced the artificial turf with real green grass. The sports stadium sold naming rights to a large technology company.
